examples: He tried to show her up in front of everyone.
The investigation showed up the corruption.
He didn't show up to the meeting.
She showed him up with her better performance.
What time will you show up?
She showed up late to the party.
His mistakes showed up in the report.
Don't show me up like that!
example_translate: Он попытался выставить её напоказ перед всеми.
Она затмила его своим лучшим выступлением.
show up.synonyms:
Появляться, приходить - arrive, appear, turn up
Разоблачать, выставлять напоказ - expose, reveal
